justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and then accurately understood the request for a broader search on the same day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then reiterated the same available options when the user asked for more flexibility on the original day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation by immediately checking availability and offering alternatives without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points.
